code: import{useParams,useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CategoryBooks(){const{category}=useParams();const navigate=useNavigate();const[books,setBooks]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState(null);const[searchQuery,setSearchQuery]=useState("");useEffect(()=>{setLoading(true);setError(null);axios.get(`http://localhost:5000/api/books/category/${category}`).then(res=>{setBooks(res.data);setLoading(false);}).catch(err=>{console.log(err);setError("Failed to load books.");setLoading(false);});},[category]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"books-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h1",{children:[category," Books"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{marginBottom:"20px",display:"flex",justifyContent:"center"},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Search by title or author...",value:searchQuery,onChange:e=>setSearchQuery(e.target.value),style:{width:"100%",maxWidth:"400px",padding:"10px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1px solid #ccc",outline:"none"}})}),loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Fetching books from the archive..."}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:"red"},children:error}),!loading&&books.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No books found in this category."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"books-grid",children:!loading&&books.filter(book=>book.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())||book.author.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())).map(book=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"book-card",onClick:()=>navigate(`/book/${book._id}`),style:{cursor:"pointer"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:book.cover,alt:book.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:book.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:book.author})]},book._id))})]});}export default CategoryBooks;
